replies.msg: 雞翼 蕃茄炒蛋

My friend Eddie is an aquarius while his girlfriend is a scorpio. He studied higher diploma in Australia but besides IT he failed all the exams and failed them again in the resits so the government refused to grant a student visa to him again. He ended up working as a security guard in a residential building whose salary is twelve thousand dollars a month. The Japanese government granted his great grandfather asylum during the First World War. In addition, his cousins Tom and Jerry have been accused of robbery. If convicted, they would be jailed for three years for robbery. The judge granted bail to Tom but refused to grant Jerry bail. Tom's parents have agreed to stand bail for him who is then remanded on bail of eighty eight thousand dollars while Jerry is remanded in custody for three weeks. The Japanese government has awarded my friend Joe a two hundred thousand dollar study grant to study biotechnology at Tokyo University. Joe loves kickboxing. He's lucky because his professor grants permission to use the cage and the ring at university.

replies.msg:
I told Eddie who's an aquarius that his maid has been stealing money from him. After an investigation he said "She's been stealing money. I'll grant you that." Eddie said his best friend Judy was coming to Hong Kong so he would have him over for a few nights. I said "having him around for a few nights is fair enough but you should let your family know before having him over." My brother too said "I grant that it's very kind of you to have her around but you should let your family know beforehand"
One of my friends said he got a front row ticket for the NBA All-star game which was very hard to buy. I said "fair enough. It was hard to buy a front row ticket but you should ask your boss if you could get a couple days off as you'll need to fly to the united states for it." He was too excited. The contract will grant you access to the swimming pool as well as the gym.
